toolbox_name: SparkFun RFD77402 I2C Laser Distance Sensor

rfd77402_take_measurement.tooltip: Trigger RFD77402 to perform one measurement

rfd77402_get_distance.tooltip: Read distance measured by RFD77402 in millimeters
